name: accepta
description: A beautiful and flexible WordPress theme that works perfectly with Elementor page builder for creating stunning websites.
author: WPDINO

scripts.compile:css: sass sass/accepta.scss assets/css/accepta.css --style=expanded --source-map && sass sass/accepta.scss assets/css/accepta.min.css --style=compressed --no-source-map && sass sass/woocommerce.scss assets/css/woocommerce.css --style=expanded --source-map && sass sass/woocommerce.scss assets/css/woocommerce.min.css --style=compressed --no-source-map && (stylelint './assets/css/*.css' --fix || true)
scripts.compile:js: terser assets/js/customizer.js -o assets/js/customizer.min.js --compress --mangle && terser assets/js/header-search.js -o assets/js/header-search.min.js --compress --mangle && terser assets/js/hero-section.js -o assets/js/hero-section.min.js --compress --mangle && terser assets/js/mobile-menu.js -o assets/js/mobile-menu.min.js --compress --mangle && terser assets/js/navigation.js -o assets/js/navigation.min.js --compress --mangle && terser assets/js/sticky-header.js -o assets/js/sticky-header.min.js --compress --mangle
scripts.compile: npm run compile:css && npm run compile:js && npm run compile:rtl
scripts.bundle: dir-archiver --src . --dest ../accepta.zip --exclude .DS_Store .stylelintrc.json .eslintrc .git .gitattributes .github .gitignore README.md composer.json composer.lock node_modules vendor package-lock.json package.json .travis.yml phpcs.xml.dist sass style.css.map
